must_detect.matched_text:
internal memo — compliance/legal — vespera renewables n.v. (eu issuer, bce listing: ticker VESX, isin ZZ0000000000)
purpose: coordination for csrd/sfdr disclosures and mar-compliant investor relations workflow for q2 update; references are public unless noted.
public-source facts: see 2026 q1 trading update and esg factsheet already posted on issuer website and bce oam; taxonomy alignment 32% and pai set a are already disclosed.
gdpr/art 9: no special-category personal data will be processed; payroll wellness items (including spa-day raffle vouchers) are excluded from the data room.
cross-border transfers: any access by non-eu advisors will rely on sccs under art 46 and a tia; uk and us reviewers restricted to anonymised kpi extracts only.
mar controls: closed period starts 30 days before interim results; insider list maintained in the esma template, role accounts only (no private emails).
ir draft: press q&a pack is under embargo until 08:00 CET on 2026-07-01; do not circulate outside the ir mailbox ir@vespera.example before that time.
m&a context (public): the supply framework with lumengrid s.p.a. was announced on 2026-03-15 and the definitive agreement is already filed on the oam; the mae clause has not been triggered.
negated mac language: no event has occurred that would reasonably be expected to result in a material adverse change as defined in the filed contract, and no waiver is contemplated.
research notes (public): broker snapshots cited in the q&a are from open-source outlets; we will not include unpublished analyst estimates or non-public model sensitivities.
checklist items: update the insider list header, verify oam timestamp alignment, confirm that the bce ris-equivalent will post concurrently in english and dutch.
